title: VASAGLE 5-Layer Shoe Rack, High Shoe Storage with 4 Mesh Shelves and Large Top for Bags, Space Saving for Entrance, Hallway, Steel, Industry, Rustic Brown and Black LBS038B01
features: Can accommodate more shoes: This 5-layer shoe rack can accommodate 20-25 pairs of shoes with the top board; the distance between each of the 4 mesh shelves is 20.4 cm to fit heels and high tops on the shelves

Reliable Support: With a maximum load capacity of 27 kg on the upper surface, you can put bags, frames, books and decorations on it; with a maximum load capacity of 11 kg on each shelf, all your shoes can safely rest on this stand
Easy storage, 2 ways: Each shelf can be placed flat or angled by mounting it into different screw holes on the side frames, allowing you to store and display your shoes as you like
Sturdy and beautiful: This shoe rack, made of chipboard and steel for a sturdy and stable structure, is also a stylish shelf with a rustic industrial design to liven up your hallway
What's in the box: A shoe rack with 5 shelves, detailed instructions and numbered parts, which free the corridor from mess and offers a good landing place for your shoes
description: Product Description Sturdy and Stable The combination of high-quality particleboard and robust steel makes the shoe rack more robust and stable Adjustable Shelves with Raised Edges The shelves can be adjusted to your needs, flat or angled; the raised edge of the shelf prevents your shoes from getting your wall dirty Specifications: Colour: Rustic Brown, Ink Black Material: Particleboard, Steel Product Size: 11.8"D x 29.5"W x 36.6"H (30 x 75 x 93 cm) Product Weight: 16.8 lb (7.6 kg) Max. Static Load Capacity of the Top Shelf: 60 lb (27 kg) Max. Static Load Capacity of Each Mesh Shelf: 25 lb (11 kg) Package Contents: 1 x Shoe Rack 1 x Accessory Kit 1 x Anti-Tip Kit 1 x Instructions VASAGLE Notes: Attach the shoe rack to the wall with the included anti-tip kit for safety.
